title: R&D and HBCU Funding Sources — New Faculty Development Seminar Slides (Kamangar / Silver)
content: Two-part Seminar 3 of the 2022 New Faculty Development series. Part 1 'R & D Funding Sources' (2022-10-24, Farin Kamangar) PDF: 2022 FD Seminar 3 P1.pdf. Part 2 'HBCU Funding Sources' (2022-10-27, Gillian Silver, start at 24:54 of recording) PDF: 2022 FD Seminar 3 P2.pdf at /Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/2022 Faculty Development Seminars/. Shared Zoom recording (proofpoint-wrapped): morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/RujGdd_kHy-I055p7A2nGqqTubWXFmme3FlGtae6Rtzad7qzzq4w8GpPv6WcDpFA.9oVrMVQ3zov3M-K_
